title: Widget state views
description: Add state-aware rendering in WidgetViews.swift driven by the WidgetEntry state enum. Three non-content states: (1) notConfigured — "Open app to sign in" prompt, shown only when CF credentials are genuinely absent (no network call); (2) empty — friendly "Nothing here yet" message; (3) offline — last-good cached entries rendered normally, or a neutral "Can't update" message when no cache exists. A 403/HTML response is treated as offline, not notConfigured. State precedence: notConfigured > empty > offline > content.
acceptance_criteria: notConfigured state renders sign-in prompt; no API call triggered
empty state renders a friendly empty message in both small and medium
offline state renders last-good entries when cache exists; neutral message otherwise
403/HTML rejection routes to offline, not notConfigured
